name: WP-W1-authority-graph: break the 4-node SCC + consent cycle (three-layer authority)
description: W1 (structural foundation) — decompose the {settings, family-access, consent, notifications} strongly-connected component into the three-layer authority model (inv-22) and sever the consent-notifications cycle, structural half (F-004 + F-029 structural; the semantic consent-gate lands in WP-W2-consent-deletion — the only intentional split in the cut).
acceptanceCriteria: The 4-node SCC is broken (no cyclic import/authority edge); module-boundary lint clean; behavior preserved (no functional regression in settings/family/consent/notifications). Findings: F-004, F-029 (structural part; F-029's semantic half is a continuation in WP-W2-consent-deletion, not double-counted). Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W1-authority-graph (commit 23d0c01ad)
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W1-authority-graph)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 → "WP-W1-authority-graph" detail block @ commit 23d0c01ad (eduagent-build) — the frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001).
Bundle rationale
F-029 explicitly folds into F-004; both are the same dependency-graph refactor establishing inv-22 three-layer authority. The cycle cannot be broken without breaking the SCC — single coherent change.
Strategy
Decompose the {settings, family-access, consent, notifications} strongly-connected component into the three-layer authority model; sever the consent⇄notifications cycle (structural half — the semantic consent-gate lands in WP-W2-consent-deletion / WI-576).
Scope
In: F-004 + F-029 (structural). Out: consent-gate runtime semantics (W2).
Findings table
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
The 4-node SCC is broken (no cyclic import/authority edge).
Module-boundary lint clean.
Behavior preserved (no functional regression in settings/family/consent/notifications).
Risk & blast radius
M / standard — module-boundary refactor, behavior-preserving. Depends on WP-W1-schema (WI-570).
